summary: Completed full backend + frontend E2E testing of Smart Mini Storage app. 20/20 pytest backend tests passed against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Full E2E user flow validated: create customer -> create shipper -> create box (auto-gen box_id + QR) -> view QR -> filter by status -> view history -> shipper app manual input -> select shipper -> select status -> submit -> verify dashboard stats updated -> verify history persisted -> delete box. All critical flows working with MongoDB persistence verified.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 on resource creation (RESTful convention)
Uses query param ?box_id=... instead of JSON body; works but unusual for POST
Deprecated FastAPI event handler; should migrate to lifespan context manager

issues: data-testid attribute is placed on Radix Select root which does NOT forward it to the DOM trigger button. As a result, data-testid='shipper-select', 'status-select', 'filter-status', 'create-box-customer-select', 'shipper-status-select' are not present in DOM and cannot be used to click triggers. Tests had to fall back to clicking placeholder text. Recommend moving data-testid onto <SelectTrigger> instead of <Select>.

action_items: (Optional) Move data-testid from <Select> wrapper onto <SelectTrigger> in ShipperApp.js, BoxesManagement.js, ShippersManagement.js so automated tests can target the dropdown triggers by data-testid.
(Optional) Use HTTP 201 for POST create endpoints.
(Optional) Migrate deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') to FastAPI lifespan context manager.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 400-line file; for future scaling consider splitting into routers (customers, shippers, boxes, scan, dashboard). Currently acceptable for MVP size.
No input validation on phone/email formats (Pydantic only enforces type str). Optional but nice.
No pagination on GET /boxes, /customers, /shippers (capped at 1000 via to_list). Will not scale beyond 1000 records.
POST /api/qr/generate accepts box_id via query param while other POST endpoints use JSON body — inconsistent API contract.
Frontend uses window.alert/window.confirm — works but UX inconsistent with shadcn UI library used elsewhere.
Radix Select wrapper doesn't propagate data-testid to DOM; will hamper future automated testing (see frontend design issues).
test_credentials: None required - app has no auth
seed_data_creation: Tests create+cleanup TEST_-prefixed customer 'TEST_Customer_Auto', shipper 'TEST_Shipper_Auto', and an auto-generated box (deleted at end). E2E browser test created TEST_E2E_467215 customer + TEST_Shipper_467215 shipper (not auto-cleaned, but harmless). Pre-existing seed: Nguyễn Văn A, Shipper Minh, BOX-8D765870.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints are public (no auth). MongoDB local backed. Public URL: https://shipper-scan-api.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_storage_api.py — reuse it as regression. For Radix Select in Shipper App / Boxes filter, prefer clicking the placeholder text (e.g., page.get_by_text('Chọn shipper...')) because data-testid is placed on the Select root, not the trigger. Manual box id entry in ShipperApp uses data-testid='manual-box-input' then 'submit-manual-button'.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues found. The only friction discovered was a test-tooling concern: Radix UI Select component does not forward data-testid from the <Select> root onto the rendered <SelectTrigger> button; tests using such selectors will time out. Workaround used: target trigger by placeholder text or role.
